snippets.snippet: Siwah ni homestay rasak 5 star hotel

address.address1: Jl. KH Agus Salim Jurong Bahagia, Ie Meulee, Kec. Sukajaya

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Sparkling clean
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests have rated this property 9.5/10 on cleanliness

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Top Value
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests rated this property 9.0/10 on value for money

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 5-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Infant 0-1 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

features.featureName: Cleaned following Agoda or health guidelines

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing

hotelFacilities.name: Cleaned following Agoda or health guidelines

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Siwah ni homestay rasak 5 star hotel

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
シャワーは水のみ
シンク無し
近所にバイクの修理屋があるのか、夜遅くまでうるさい。
comments.reviewPositives:
部屋がきれい
中心地から近い
宿の主人が色々と助けてくれる

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Wow I had a 10/10 stay!! Owner & staff fantastic, always on hand , ready if I needed anything. 
Superb room & bedding! 
It’s a yes from me! It’s a must stay 👍😘
